linkedServices.name: ls_nyc311_http

properties.description: Placeholder linked service for the NYC Open Data 311 API endpoint.

linkedServices.notes: Use a Socrata app token or request headers only if the final API contract requires them. No credential is stored here.

linkedServices.name: ls_adls_nyc311

properties.description: Placeholder ADLS Gen2 linked service for raw, curated, and log storage.

linkedServices.notes: Replace the storage account placeholder and wire managed identity or Key Vault-backed authentication during deployment.

linkedServices.name: ls_databricks_nyc311

properties.description: Placeholder linked service for the Databricks workspace that continues bronze, silver, and gold processing.

linkedServices.notes: No token or secret is included. Final authentication and cluster policy decisions are intentionally left as placeholders.
